subject: FILM
course_description: This class explores camera acting, including making the transition from stage to screen. Through on-camera exercises, collaborative projects, and screenings, actors will gain the tools they need to perform in a film, web or television shoot with greater confidence, clarity and freedom.
course_notes: FILM 376 or THEA 221 or THEA 222 or equivalent transfer credit as prerequisite.
requisites: FILM 376 or THEA 221 or THEA 222 or equivalent transfer credit as prerequisite.
